name: code-review
tagline: Code review process: style-guide reference, automated style check, issue scan, and severity-tiered feedback.
verdict: Concrete review process and feedback format. But it calls get_skill_reference/get_skill_script for style-guide.md and check_style.py - neither file exists in this skill, and there's no fallback if that lookup or script fails, nor any declared runtime requirement for the script.

highlights.summary: Description states function (linting, style checking) but no explicit trigger scenario or example phrasing.
No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere in the file.
No fallback if get_skill_reference/get_skill_script (style guide, check_style.py) are unavailable or fail.
